title: Dancing on a Dime
writer: Maurice Rapf, Anne Morrison Chapin, Allen Rivkin
actors: Grace McDonald, Robert Paige, Virginia Dale
plot: From Wikipedia: "Dancing on a Dime" is a 1940 Paramount Pictures movie directed by Joseph Santley about five actors and dancers putting on a show while living in a theatre. It is adapted from a novel of the same name written by Do...
